subcodes.title: Aufaatasiga
subcodes.first_line:
## Aufaatasiga

Le Alii e! E ma’eu le tele naua o nei foa’ialofa ua tu’uina mai e Lau Afio, ma e ma’eu le tetele o tāfeg
subcodes.notes: Theory: AB unity prayer -- "O Lord! How immense are Thy gifts... Thou hast made all hearts to become one heart, all souls to become one soul." Likely AB prayer for unity. Not found in inventory.
